cases.title: Search user valid
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify user can search an existing account.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open search bar
2. Enter existing username
3. Click search

**Expected result :**
Correct user appears in results.

cases.title: Search invalid/no results
cases.description:
**Description :** Verify system handles non-existing usernames.

**Steps to reproduce :**

1. Open search
2. Enter invalid username
3. Search

**Expected result :**
“No results found” message displayed.
